title: Stackable Enchants by Selah
description: Removes mutual exclusivity from (Blast, Fire, Projectile) Protection (1.14-1.14.2) & from Infinity and Mending (Pre-1.11.1) and adds cross-enchantability for Bow & Crossbow exclusive Enchantments.
body:
### Readme File:  
(with added markdown)

This is the generic readme file for my Custom Enchanting datapacks. Please visit the Modrinth website for more details of each pack. WARNING: IF YOU DOWNLOADED THIS FROM A SOURCE OTHER THAN MODRINTH, IT IS NOT AN AUTHENTIC VERSION AND MAY (or may not) CONTAIN VIRUSES OR MALWARE. THE ONLY VALID DOWNLOAD IS https://modrinth.com/datapack/stackable-enchants-by-selah

#### Starting with installation:
 * Put the datapack in your "/AppData/Roaming/.minecraft/saves/[Your World Here]/datapack" folder.
   * If you changed where Minecraft loads from, find that location and use that "saves" folder.
   * For servers, put it in your world folder that matches where your server.properties file says.
 * ***DO NOT put the datapack in your "/AppData/Roaming/.minecraft/resourcepacks" folder.***

#### For advanced users:
 * IF you want to store it in your ".minecraft" folder, CREATE a folder called "datapack" and put it there.
 * From there, when you create a world and go to add datapacks, you can simply go to this folder and grab what you need.

This pack was made by Selah (AspieGamer13).
If you want to use this pack in your single player worlds or multiplayer servers, just use them. This is what they're meant for. If you want to use this pack in your custom modpack or similar, there is ONE condition: Make sure you give proper credit for these packs. There is NO authorization to modify elements of this pack with intent to redistribute. You may ONLY modify elements of this pack FOR PERSONAL USE.

#### Datapack version reference (as of 1.21.7):
| Pack Version  | pack_format   | MC Version     |
|:-------------:|:-------------:|:--------------:|
| 1.0.x         | 48            | 1.21-1.21.1    |
| 1.1.x         | 57            | 1.21.2-1.21.3  |
| 1.2.x         | 61            | 1.21.4         |
| 1.3.x         | 71            | 1.21.5         |
| 1.4.x         | 80            | 1.21.6         |
| 1.5.x         | 81            | 1.21.7-1.21.8  |
| 1.6.x         | 88            | 1.21.9-1.21.10 |
| 1.7.x         | 94            | 1.21.11        |

As custom enchanting is new to 1.20.5 and 1.21 was released less than two months later, there are no plans to support 1.20.5-6 and it is impossible to support older versions.

(end of ReadMe file)

Snapshots are NOT directly supported. Report bugs/issues to my Discord (discord.gg/zJbQVFq) in the appropriate channel.

#### Known Issues

Quick Charge does not work with Bows. This is due to how Mojang have implemented charging a crossbow vs drawing a bow.
